NO APPEARANCE. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO VACATE SANCTIONS ISSUED ON 11/7/01 AND 1/9/03 TO ROBERT BURTON, ESQ., IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 EACH IS SCHEDULED TODAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE OR OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS GRANTED. SANCTIONS ARE ORDERED VACATED. COURT SIGNED PROPOSED ORDER.
